title: MoreWolf
description:
More Wolves Mod 🐺

This mod simply adds more wolves to your Minecraft world. It was developed for a German roleplay project.
body:
# More Wolves 🐺
**This mod adds new types of wolves that naturally spawn in specific biomes.
It was developed for a German roleplay project.**

# Features:

- **New wolf variants: Black, brown, red, and snow wolf**
- **Natural spawning in taiga and snowy biomes**
# Planned Feature:
- **Custom wolf entities – independent from the vanilla wolf**
- **Ability for others to add their own wolves**
